Description: Please check on log   when sponsor upgrade foa to abo have change sponsor or not ?notenow upline is
Short description: Please check on log   when sponsor upgrade foa to abo have change sponsor or not ?
Close notes:
200-207231358 is the upgrade order placed by 7017624477 on Dec 03, 2023 12:31:46 PM
As checked in BOSS we can see user sponsor is 2214008.

Analysis :

When 7017624477 registered as FOA on 06/26/2023 the sponsor was : 2214008
and while upgrading the user on 03/12/2023 has selected the sponsor as 7018950235 and the same has been updated to MLOS and we can see the success message also from los

Logs :-

2023-11-03 12:32:06.763INFO [TaskExecutor-master-91568-ProcessTask [85304049304502]] [LynxSponsorUpdateAction] [] Identified current sponsor for Order : 200-207231358 and ABO : 7017624477 is different from Referral ABO : 7018950235 . Calling MLOS API to Update Sponsor.

2023-11-03 12:32:06.764INFO [TaskExecutor-master-91568-ProcessTask [85304049304502]] [LynxSponsorUpdateServiceImpl] [] MASHERY TOKEN call : Change Sponsor to 7018950235 for ABO : 7017624477:: Initiated

2023-11-03 12:32:07.576INFO [TaskExecutor-master-91568-ProcessTask [85304049304502]] [LynxSponsorUpdateServiceImpl] [] MLOS Call : Change Sponsor to 7018950235 for ABO : 7017624477:: success with message : Sponsor Change: Success


Now the sponsor has again changed back to the old ADA 2214008 as this is a known issue and is a implementation gap between hybris, MDMS and MLos and this is similar to INC1573452,INC1688664. Business already know this and it is a new requirement and please find the email from @Phongsiri Wongammarukhachok attached.

Closing this case as discussed with @[Phongsiri Wongammarukhachok] .

Description: Please check SKU   and  SKU264903  not found on webPlease check and share root cause
Short description: Please check SKU   and  SKU264903  not found on web
Close notes:
Hi @[Mutita Kitpaiboonchai],

Please follow the below steps to change the Display mode in Base and variant products to expanded.

In Backoffice check if the display mode of the base product is expanded and for variant products its Collapsed.

In this case follow the below steps :
In the staged version of the base product change the display mode back to collapsed and sync the staged to online.
Now again in staged version of the base product change the display mode to expanded and sync the staged to online.

After doing the second step check the variant products and for these products, the display mode will be changed to Expanded now.
The reason to do this once from collapsed it is changed to expanded and the synced from staged to online it automatically syncs the same to variants as expanded and we have executed the same via Backoffice.

Please let us know in case of any further concerns.
Marking this as resolved as confirmed by @[Phongsiri Wongammarukhachok].

Thanks
Full description: Please check SKU   and  SKU264903  not found on webPlease check and share root cause-Please check SKU   and  SKU264903  not found on web

Close notes:
200-981507887 is from webmobile
It is placed on 03/03/2023 12:05:01 PM

There are no logs available for this as this order is older than 3 months.

But as checked the transaction is the order :

1) Payment via Ebanking was intiated for the request id : 260793865_203731 at 03/03/2023 8:37:31 PM
2) 260793865_203731 the same request id has been cancelled at 03/03/2023 8:38:08 PM
3) The initated transaction is cancelled, and then success reponse was recieved from the bank at 03/03/2023 8:41:24 PM so the transaction has been set as "REJECTED".

So the order has not been marked as PAID although the success reponse is recieved. At the EOD the order is cancelled and against the above success reponse the AR has been issued. This is much before the the actual fix of the ebanking issue which was done in sepetember month of 2023

• The same was signed off by business on August 22nd, 2023, and this was a part of the release in September 2023.

So, this will be a new change not a bug and furthermore discussion will be continued on email. AS confirmed by @[Phongsiri Wongammarukhachok] over teams call closing this incident.

Description: According to issue we found that order period is different from bonus period. We found  root causes those create different between Bonus Period and Order.. Register Order. The register order that creates during month end and complete payment on different month (For example, Order ). SOP-CM Profile. The SOP-CM Profile that creates during 28th to month end. (For example, Order )Both cases, Bonus period must be the same month when payment completes.
Short description: Bonus Period must same as Payment Period (Payment completed)
Close notes:
Please find the comments from BA @Tamanna Kler

1. Register Order. The register order that creates during month end and complete payment on different month (For example, Order 205116382)

Analysis: The bonus period is created when the order is created not when the payment is done .
@Tamanna Kler Business is expecting the bonus period should change to the date when the payment is done, which is not the current behaviour.
Please confirm on this , if the expectation of business is a new requirement or a bug.
[TK]: This is working as expected. If order is created in November but the payment is done in December, then the bonus period must be November only.
Example - User is at the payment page on 30th Nov and done the last Payment Transaction on 1st December and then placed the order.
Order Period: December
Bonus Period: November

2. SOP-CM Profile. The SOP-CM Profile that creates during 28th to month end. (For example, Order 205153015)

Analysis: The SOP-CM profile created between 28th to month end belongs to that particular month and will be picked up by the cronjob on 1st of next month .
For ex: when the SOP-CM profile is created on 30th September , then SOP profile starts from month September and the September month's SOP element will be picked up by 1st October cronjob.
Since the cronjob process the profiles of the previous day, Bonus period also set as previous month(the month that is set in SOP Profile)
Please find the discussion regarding this issue in the attachment.

@Tamanna Kler, Business expectation is that since the order is placed on October the bonus period also must be of October, but currently for SOP CM order the bonus period is set same as processing month of SOP CM profile.
[TK]: This is working as expected. Bonus period should be set to September month only.


Both are working as expected.

Closing this case as confirmed with @[Phongsiri Wongammarukhachok] over teams chat.
Full description: According to issue we found that order period is different from bonus period. We found  root causes those create different between Bonus Period and Order.. Register Order. The register order that creates during month end and complete payment on different month (For example, Order ). SOP-CM Profile. The SOP-CM Profile that creates during 28th to month end. (For example, Order )Both cases, Bonus period must be the same month when payment completes.-Bonus Period must same as Payment Period (Payment completed)

These configurations are needed at the time of product creation or new warehouse creation.

We have manually created the stocklevel for all the warehouses for the skus mentioned. After today's day end feed all the entries will be adjusted.

We would like to mark the Incident as resolved for now.

Description: order paid by cash on Sep ,  :: AMBut ABO can cancel by herself right after  Sep ,  :: AM* Order Number :* Order Date & time : Sep ,  ::* PIF Cash 610010259_20230907-Sep ,  :: AM  ,,. ACCEPTED*Cancel By :  L TH KIM CNG*Cancel Date/Time : Sep ,  :: AM=> pls help to check for this issue
Short description: Orders are paid in cash but ABo can cancel immediately afterwards
Close notes:
We checked and found that the user had clicked cancel at the same time when the payment was taken at POS.
Due to this multiple processes ran simultaneously, ie. payment capture, response capture, order process and cancel process.
By the time, the order was yet to confirm , the order was cancelled already through cancel process.

2023-09-07T03:50:43,363+00:00 | [INFO] [hybrisHTTP40] [LynxVietnamPaymentUpdateCommandHook] 119220706 | Setting cart payment status as PAID for order number : 500-610010259
2023-09-07T03:50:52,297+00:00 | [DEBUG] [hybrisHTTP10] [DefaultLynxOrderCancelService] [127.0.0.6] 119220706-500-610028436 | OrderCancel: Inside DefaultLynxOrderCancelService.requestOrderCancel method for cancellation of order 500-610010259


Both the actions have microseconds difference and hence this happened due to user error.

We can see the credit voucher is provided to the user.

For now, we would like to mark the Incident as resolved.

As discussed with @[Phongsiri Wongammarukhachok] we are closing this INC

We have already dropped the mail and further communication will be carried out in mail

RCA :

We have checked and found that system is working as expected :

There is a "entryDeductedMemberPoint" from 102578TH and 117580TH both equal to 3.3333333499999998
*2

How it is calculated:

entryDeductedMemberPoint = ((orderEntry.getTotalPrice() * memberPointTransactions.getLeft().doubleValue()) / memberPointTransactions.getRight())
entryDeductedMemberPoint=(1500*100)/3000=50

Double memberPoints = entryDeductedMemberPoint * memberPointCreditFactor;
memberPoints=50*0.066666667=3.3333333499999998

So entryDeductedMemberPoint got subtracted from Total amplus point
(400-(3.3333333499999998*2))=393

Please find the attached screenshot


Thanks

In this case, user can tokenize the card again and try to do payment with the given card.


We could see that issue is due to saved card (Nick Name: Maybank ema, Token ID: 9384733623285130) is not a valid token anymore in MPGS token vault. 
The other saved card (Nick Name: 304951, Token ID: 9149470519820524) which has no issue, is a valid token in MPGS and was tokenized on 19-Sept-2023. Both tokens are having same masked PAN (5491 86XX XXXX 4951) and same expiry.\

We have advised caller to suggest to ABO to remove the invalid saved card from account.
 
PRB0075590 has been raised to handle the error on the screen. Further progress can be tracked on PRB.

Marking the incident as resolved.

Description: ALP address (ALP flag) in address book is **********When ABO creates ALP profile, the default address not showing as per address book but display as Ong Sze Nee, -, Jalan Dato Mohd Ali, Endao, JB, . Please refer to attached video and investigate why default address not showing as per address book.
Short description: ALP default address not showing the same as per ALP address stated in address book
Close notes:
Hi @Amelia Sze Wei Teoh,
ALP tags can be multiple in delivery address management in storefront as the ALP tags are associated with the address in every ALP profile.
Whatever address is associated with any ALP profile, it will have ALP tag with it.
Therefore, since multiple ALP tags are possible, system does not take default address with ALP tagged address.
It takes first address as default address

Short description: No default pick up location in ordering.
Close notes:
emp enters the settlement interface--pick up. By default, there is no address details--->Click to pay-->Other systems start verification and find that the information is missing--->Because the entire block of information is missing, other systems may An error message is returned when it is judged that the entire piece of information is missing (configuration error), or an error message is returned when the address information cannot be detected (the address information needs to be updated) --> leading to different pop-up 

This error message comes from other teams. Since the pickup does not have warehouse information by default and needs to be added manually, such a verification error will occur. If you need to change this error message, you may need to contact other teams or open a CCR to add it to the pickup. Default warehouse

On the support side, there are no open issues, so we mark them as resolved

Description: ABO cancelled order but PV BV still reflected in Magic Sep',  ABO cancelled from  Sep .
Short description: ABO cancelled order but PV BV still reflected in Magic Sep' - high
Close notes:
We checked and found that the user had clicked cancel at the same time when the payment was taken at POS.
Due to this multiple processes ran simultaneously, ie. payment capture, response capture, order process and cancel the process.
By the time, the order was yet to be confirmed, the order was cancelled already through the cancellation process.

2023-09-07T03:50:43,363+00:00 | [INFO] [hybrisHTTP40] [LynxVietnamPaymentUpdateCommandHook] 119220706 | Setting cart payment status as PAID for order number: 500-610010259
2023-09-07T03:50:52,297+00:00 | [DEBUG] [hybrisHTTP10] [DefaultLynxOrderCancelService] [127.0.0.6] 119220706-500-610028436 | OrderCancel: Inside DefaultLynxOrderCancelService.requestOrderCancel method for cancellation of order 500-610010259


Both the actions have microseconds difference and hence this happened due to user error.


The order process failed due to this and hence events were not processed
Full description: ABO cancelled order but PV BV still reflected in Magic Sep',  ABO cancelled from  Sep .-ABO cancelled order but PV BV still reflected in Magic Sep' - high

Description: For all SOP when ada make CM  profile the product should not auto add to cartfacing on sop wellness and sop flex
Short description: For all SOP when ada make CM  profile the product should not auto add to cart
Close notes:
Incident : INC1640593

Description : For all SOP when ada make CM profile the product should not auto add to cart
facing on sop wellness and sop flex.1444200

Analysis :

• We have checked on all the environments UAT, PSUP and PROD after selecting the SOP Wellness, SOP flex and then selecting C-M (i.e., card option, address, and day which the money should be deducted then clicking on apply) the product is getting added to the cart.
• The once product is added to the cart, we are able to check out and make payment for the same.

As per expected functionality for CM subscription, it is working like this.

Case 1: Company Managed subscription created after 27th day of month.
SOP product won't be added to cart in case CM were created after 27th day of month. It is because any CM subscription created after 27th have its 1st element in the next month which can't be purchased in current month.
For example, any CM subscription that was created on 28th September choosing the processing day as 10th in actual starts from October, having first month element processing day as 10th October, 2nd month element processing day as 10th November and so on..

Case 2: Company Managed  subscription created on or before 27th day of month.
Any CM subscription created on or before 27th will have its first element in the same month only and that in this case first month element will be added to cart as it can be purchased in same month.
For example, any CM subscription created today(3rd October)
Case 1: Selected processing day is 2nd 
              First element processing day will be 3rd October( as 2nd October is already passed) and will be added to cart immediately at the time of creating subscription. If user checkout and place the order, element will be marked as processed. This element will not be picked up by the cronjob that will run on 4th October as element is already processed. If user doesn't place the order for this element it will be picked up by the cronjob on 4th and order will be placed automatically. All following month elements of this subscription will have its processing day as 2nd (2nd Nov, 2nd Dec and so on…)

Case 2: Selected processing day is 10th
              First element processing day will be 10th October( as 10th October is not passed yet) and will be added to cart immediately at the time of creating subscription. If user checkout and place the order, element will be marked as processed. This element will not be picked up by the cronjob that will run on 11th October as element is already processed. If user doesn't place the order for this element, it will be picked up by the cronjob on 11th and order will be placed automatically. All following month elements of this subscription will have its processing day as 10th (10th Nov, 10th Dec and so on…). For October month element order can be placed anytime before its being processed by cronjob on 11th October, by adding element to cart manually from SOP management page on SF, via POS and other channels as well. 

As confirmed by @[Phongsiri Wongammarukhachok] over team's call closing this incident.
Thanks
Full description: For all SOP when ada make CM  profile the product should not auto add to cartfacing on sop wellness and sop flex-For all SOP when ada make CM  profile the product should not auto add to cart

Short description: [DATA RECON][SG][ ORDERS] Return order value & Tax Value mismatch
Close notes:
RCA: According to hybris calculation -> total conversion fee is 10 SGD , feeAmount is 9.26 + taxAmount is SGD 0.74,  in return payload.
But EBS is considering total conversion fee as SGD 9.26 and calculating tax on top of this amount.
So according to EBS calculation, feeAmount comes to SGD 8.52 and taxamount is SGD 0.74, which was leading to diff of SGD  0.74.

Now the issue is fixed from Hybris through problem ticket: PRB0075760.
New returns created have correct conversion fee value.

No we cases reported/found after the fix.

No action can be taken from Hybris side for the impacted return orders.
If the data needs to be corrected at EBS for the existing impacted return orders, please check with EBS and business.

Description: Please check and share root causewhy sop transaction payment on  stpl   ada  pl   ada
Short description: Please check ada   and   set SOP CM on  Every 5th  , why sop transaction payment on  st
Close notes:
Hello @[Phongsiri Wongammarukhachok]

 

Analysis from Prerit :
As we checked the logs, both of these subscriptions were created on 30th under SM profile so both of them started from September month only and the first elements were added to cart immediately but user didn't place the order. After that user changed the processing day from SOP management page. 
For both subscriptions, user selected the processing day as 5th while changing the processing day. The processing day updated to 30th September for first element(as 5th September has already been passed), 5th October for second element, 5th November for third element and so on. For September month element processing day was 30th so it was picked up the cronjob on 1st October.

Description: Please assist to check on why ABO is unable to postpone his ALP.ABO number:  YAP TIAM HEE @ YAP TIAM HIOrder number: ALP profile: PROTEINAs per order , ABO purchased  XS Active Ageing Pack B which consists of  unit of 122594M Nutrilite Soy Protein Drink - 900g in this bundle.ALP profile: PROTEIN consists of  unit of 122594M Nutrilite Soy Protein Drink - 900g too.The postponement failed.
Short description: Unable to postpone ALP
Close notes:
According to the current design, the system allows the postponement of SOP only when a product-level promotion is applied to the same SKU that is part of the ALP. In this reported case, while the SKU and quantity match those in the ALP subscription, there is no product-level promotion applied to that specific SKU. As a result, the system did not postpone SOP.

Closing this ticket as the caller's confirmation in the comments.
